title: fagraea ternatana
intro: Fagraea ternatana is a species of flowering plant in the family Gentianaceae, commonly known as the 'Frangipani Tree' or 'Lisianthus Tree'. Native to the tropical forests of Southeast Asia, this plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antimicrobial activities. The health benefits of Fagraea ternatana include its potential to reduce fever, alleviate respiratory issues, and aid in wound healing. Fagraea ternatana is often prepared as a tea or tincture, and its leaves and flowers can be used in herbal remedies, such as infusions and topical applications.
